name: libcurl4t64
title: libcurl4t64
summary: easy-to-use client-side URL transfer library (OpenSSL flavour)
description:
easy-to-use client-side URL transfer library (OpenSSL flavour)
libcurl is an easy-to-use client-side URL transfer library, supporting DICT,
FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, POP3, POP3S,
RTMP, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET and TFTP.
.
libcurl supports SSL certificates, HTTP POST, HTTP PUT, FTP uploading, HTTP
form based upload, proxies, cookies, user+password authentication (Basic,
Digest, NTLM, Negotiate, Kerberos), file transfer resume, http proxy tunneling
and more!
.
libcurl is free, thread-safe, IPv6 compatible, feature rich, well supported,
fast, thoroughly documented and is already used by many known, big and
successful companies and numerous applications.
.
SSL support is provided by OpenSSL.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libcurl4t64 because easy-to-use client-side URL transfer library (OpenSSL flavour).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libcurl4t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libcurl4t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libcurl4t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
